name: rtime-profile
description: Read-only assistant profile and policy diagnostics for rtime assistant workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect assistant persona, prompt, model, and permission policy.
interface.longDescription: Rtime Profile provides read-only diagnostics and planning for assistant profile sources, prompt layering, model policy, permission policy, output behavior, memory behavior, and sensitive-data rules across Mac and orangepi clients.
defaultPrompt: Plan a persona or model policy adjustment.
Check profile sources without reading secrets.
